src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/playlist/M.general_idea: Wrap list access in Optional and catch IndexOutOfBoundsException to prevent runtime crashes when a song file is not found.
src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/playlist/M.why_exists: IndexOutOfBoundsException thrown at runtime if songDatabase.searchFileName returns an empty list

src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/server/MPD.general_idea: Replace parseInt with Float.parseFloat cast to int to handle floating-point string values for MIX_RAMP_DB.
src/main/java/org/bff/javampd/server/MPD.why_exists: NumberFormatException at runtime if the status string contains a decimal point (e.g., "1.5"), as parseInt cannot parse floats.
